targets.notes: Stated as a net-zero goal by 2030 covering operations and the value chain; specific base year and reduction pathway not specified here.
targets.title: Net-zero emissions across operations and value chain by 2030

targets.notes: Goal to match electricity consumption with carbon-free energy on an hourly basis (24/7) by 2030; not expressed as a GHG emissions reduction target.
targets.title: Operate on 24/7 carbon-free energy by 2030

targets.notes: Ongoing renewable energy matching claim for annual electricity consumption, first achieved in 2017; not a full value-chain GHG target.
targets.title: Match 100% of annual electricity use with renewable energy (achieved from 2017 onward)

targets.notes: Claim of carbon neutrality since 2007 achieved through the use of carbon offsets; scope coverage details not specified here.
targets.title: Carbon neutral operations since 2007 (via offsets)
